title: Industrium
description: Modpack built for players seeking an immersive industrial and exploration experience in Minecraft 1.20.1. Featuring major tech mods like Create, Modern Industrialization, Tech Reborn, and Applied Energistics 2
body:
This is a performance-optimized Fabric modpack built for players seeking an immersive industrial and exploration experience in Minecraft 1.20.1. Featuring major tech mods like Create, Modern Industrialization, Tech Reborn, and Applied Energistics 2, the pack provides rich automation, resource processing, and factory-building mechanics. It’s balanced with exploration content like YUNG’s Better Dungeons, Bosses of Mass Destruction, and Terralith for exciting world generation and adventure.

With over 150 finely curated mods, this pack is designed for both singleplayer and multiplayer use, with stability and performance at its core—thanks to optimization tools like Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, and Starlight. Whether you’re into heavy industry, sprawling bases, or deep exploration, this pack has something for you.
